# Project Reference - testing

> **IMPORTANT:** These are summaries. READ the full doc file when working in the matching context.

## [Integration Test Reference](../../docs/project-reference/integration-test-reference.md)

**Summary:** Two integration-test styles — DEFAULT subcutaneous CQRS through real DI (no HTTP) extending `TextSnippetIntegrationTestBase`, and HTTP-level via `WebApplicationFactory<Program>`. xUnit + FluentAssertions; ALL tests use a `[Collection]` attribute and `IntegrationTestHelper.UniqueName()` for collision-free data; assert real DB state via polling; live infra with no DB reset. Covers base classes, fixtures/factories, helpers, and running tests.

> **READ** `docs/project-reference/integration-test-reference.md` when: Writing, reviewing, or fixing backend integration tests; choosing the correct base class/style; ensuring isolation, unique test data, and real-state assertions.

## [E2E Test Reference](../../docs/project-reference/e2e-test-reference.md)

**Summary:** Resilient Playwright E2E for the `playground-text-snippet` Angular app — Page Object Model on `BasePage`, Angular-aware waits (never `networkidle`), API-level arrange/cleanup via `ApiHelpers` in `afterEach`, `createTestTask()`/`createTestSnippet()` factories, priority tags (`@P0`–`@P3`), import `test`/`expect` from `utils/test-helpers`, and selectors only in page objects.

> **READ** `docs/project-reference/e2e-test-reference.md` when: Authoring or maintaining Playwright E2E tests, page objects, fixtures, or wait/assertion patterns for the frontend app.
